|--------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------|-------------|
| 2.1 | Engage with relevant stakeholders to inform development of mechanism for future funding of digital technology infrastructure incorporating appropriate provision for technical support, in line with technical support solutions identified as part of this plan and address equipment obsolescence as appropriate. | DE | Medium term |
| 2.2 | Through the Schools Broadband Programme, continue: - connectivity upgrade to 100 Mbps or greater for primary schools located in the National Broadband Plan Intervention Area (NBP IA), and - connectivity upgrade of primary schools through the NRRP funded project, that is, schools outside of the NBP IA and where industry will not provide high speed connectivity. | DE | Short term |
| 2.3 | Consider the functions and processes of the Schools Broadband Services Desk in the context of providing the optimal service to schools in the delivery of the broadband programme. | DE | Medium term |
| 2.4 | Provide necessary support and guidance to schools on digital technology infrastructure to highlight relevant topics including: a) appropriate hardware and software for embedding digital technologies in teaching, learning and assessment, with a particular focus on the learner experience, for example in good practice videos, b) infrastructure to support digital learning planning, c) information and links to procurement mechanisms for digital technology for schools where available. | OIDE TiE | In progress |
| 2.5 | Ensure the Technology in Education website incorporates content and resources relating to digital technology infrastructure, emerging priorities and identified needs in the sector as required. | OIDE TiE | In progress |
| 2.6 | Conduct market research on available technical support solutions, including engagement with industry as required. | DE | Short term |

| 2.7 | Based on findings of market research, undertake consultation with education stakeholders to determine appropriate solutions for a sustainable technical support model for all schools. | DE | Short term |
|-------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------|--------------|
| 2.8 | Commence implementation of technical support solutions.

topic_prototype: The Digital Strategy aims to establish a comprehensive framework for integrating digital technologies into education.

heading_context: Pillar 3 Looking to the future: policy, research and digital leadership
chunk_text:
Pillar 3 Looking to the future: policy, research and digital leadership

Ensure the Digital Strategy for Schools to 2027 and its associated Implementation Plan supports and complements other relevant strategies and polices both nationally and at EU level. Provide assistance and guidance to schools to understand how relevant strategies related to the use of digital technologies in teaching, learning and assessment can be implemented. Continue to engage with and monitor relevant international and EU initiatives including the EU DEAP so that research and supports can be considered and adopted for the Irish context and disseminated to the system. Promote participation and engagement in EU and national research. Undertake research in key areas to inform the development of relevant supports and resources for schools. Continue to support the development and dissemination of high quality resources to promote the safe, responsible and ethical use of the internet and digital technology, informed by national and international policy and best practice. Promote the use of digital technologies to facilitate communication within the wider school community and education ecosystem particularly involving parents and learners. --

chunk_text:
Pillar 3 Actions

| Action No. | Pillar 3 Actions | Lead/Delivered By | Timeline |
|--------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------|-------------|
| 3.1 | Continue to support, promote, disseminate and engage with relevant national and EU strategies that impact the use of digital technologies in education. These include - EU Digital Education Action Plan 2021- 2027 - Harnessing Digital: The Digital Ireland Framework - National Strategy on Artificial Intelligence 'AI Here for Good' - Education for Sustainable Development to 2030 - EU Ethical Guidelines on the use of Artificial Intelligence in Education - Guidelines for teachers and educators on tackling disinformation and promoting digital literacy through education and training. | DE | In progress |
| 3.2 | Support and align with the implementation of the STEM Education Implementation Plan to 2026, in particular measures to address the gender gap in the uptake of STEM subjects. | DE | In progress |
| 3.3 | Support the implementation of the Literacy, Numeracy and Digital Literacy Strategy 2024-2033: Every Learner from Birth to Young Adulthood with a focus on Digital Literacy. | DE | In progress |
| 3.4 | Support the implementation of Cinéaltas: Action Plan on Bullying through actions related to Webwise, cyberbullying, engagement with Coimisiún na Meán and representation on the National Advisory Council for Online Safety . | DE | In progress |
| 3.5 | Continued promotion and provision of curriculum aligned educational resources and programmes for schools in online safety and digital citizenship to help promote healthy online relationships, digital media literacy and respectful | Webwise | In progress |

chunk_text:
Measurement and Oversight Actions

| Action. | Measurement And Oversight | DELIVERED BY | Timeline |
|-----------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------|-------------|
| M.1 | Establish Steering Group to oversee and guide implementation of Digital Strategy for Schools to include representation from relevant internal policy areas within the Department who have a role in delivering on actions. | DE | Completed |
| M.2 | Establish Consultative Group to faciliate engagement with relevant stakeholders on the roll out of the Strategy and its associated actions and any relevant developments in this area. | DE | Short term |
| M.3 | Establish Industry Group to provide a formal means of communication between industry and the Department and to faclitate industry supporting digital transformation and capacity building in schools. | DE | Medium term |
| M.4 | Publication of Longitudinal Study on the Digital Learning Framework by the Educational Research Centre and consider recommendations to help inform furture policy and impact of DLF | ERC/DE | Short term |
| M.5 | Consider the evaluation report on the School Excellence Fund Digital & STEM and disseminate relevant findings and learnings to wider system. | DE | Short term |
| M.6 | Commission research on impact of digital technologies in education on learning | DE | Medium term |
| M.7 | Carry out analysis on whether targeted studies or research is needed on particular topics and undertake as appropriate. | DE | Medium term |
| M.8 | Undertake research and examination on AI in education. | DE | Long term |
| M.9 | Undertake preparatory work to faciliate Ireland's participation in the International Computer and Information Literacy Study scheduled for 2028. | DE | Medium term |
